name: Leverage
description: A Hyperion repeater built for sustained precision fire. Its long Jakobs barrel trades fire rate for stronger damage and cleaner long-range performance, while Hyperion's tightening accuracy rewards holding the trigger rather than tapping shots. The result is a pistol that feels more stable and deliberate than most repeaters in its class.
notes: In Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel, Leverage variants often use Hyperion's newer materials and prefix set. A related counterpart there is the Attitude, made by the older Hyperion line. Because it uses the Jakobs long barrel, it only appears at green rarity or higher. It is a random world drop from suitable loot sources.
